entries.test: OutputManagementHooks > tool-output-truncator > 1MB output -> truncated to budget with [truncated] suffix
entries.diagnosis: API change: registerToolOutputTruncator hook now delegates to Truncate.output() which saves full output to file and produces '...N bytes truncated...\nFull output saved to: <path>' format instead of old '[truncated' suffix from local truncateOutput() helper
entries.fix_applied: Updated test assertion from toContain('[truncated') to toContain('truncated') and toContain('Full output saved to:')

entries.test: OutputManagementHooks > tool-output-truncator > output with [REDACTED: Security Protected] -> markers preserved after truncation
entries.diagnosis: API change: Truncate.output() does not preserve [REDACTED: Security Protected] markers in truncated output — full output (with markers) is saved to file instead
entries.fix_applied: Updated test to verify truncation occurred and file-save hint is present, instead of expecting marker preservation in truncated output

entries.test: OutputManagementHooks > tool-output-truncator > 15MB stream -> only first N bytes read + tail message
entries.diagnosis: API change: same root cause as F-001 — Truncate.output() format differs from old truncateOutput() format
entries.fix_applied: Updated test assertion from toContain('[truncated') to toContain('truncated') and toContain('Full output saved to:')

entries.test: tool-output-truncator security marker preservation > tool-output-truncator preserves [REDACTED: Security Protected] markers
entries.diagnosis: API change: same root cause as F-002 — Truncate.output() saves markers to file rather than preserving in truncated output
entries.fix_applied: Updated test to verify truncation and file-save hint instead of marker presence in truncated output
